-- but the deployed code's Empresa JPA entity requires the column. Pending until applied to prod.
-- Phase 4: per-center / per-tenant waste-platform routing target.
-- Nullable; null = inherit (center → empresa → ESIR). Holds a WastePlatform name.
-- Explicit COLLATE (Phase-3 lesson: omitting it inherits the MySQL-8 server default).
CALL zn_add_column_if_missing('entidad_centro', 'waste_submission_target', 'VARCHAR(16) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NULL')
CALL zn_add_column_if_missing('empresa', 'waste_submission_target', 'VARCHAR(16) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NULL')
archive/2026-06-27_001_address-drop-name:
-- Drop the 3 composite (country_id, pais) → _ine_pais(country_id, nombre)
-- name-forcing FKs (entidad, entidad_centro, empleado). Address name correctness
-- moves to AddressResolver (server-side derivation on save). See
-- docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-27-address-name-fk-design.md.
--
-- Backfill strategy — CONSISTENT TUPLES, bottom-up (mirrors AddressResolver):
--   The kept hierarchy FKs are COMPOSITE:
--     fk_*_munic (locality_id, province_id) → _ine_municipio
--     fk_*_prov  (province_id, region_id)   → _ine_provincia
--   A naive per-level backfill that sets province_id from the municipio while
--   leaving a stale region_id makes (province_id, region_id) inconsistent and the
--   composite FK rejects the row (MySQL FK checks are immediate, not deferrable —
--   this is the 1452 error the top-down version hit on real data). So each row is
--   updated by its DEEPEST set id in ONE statement that derives the WHOLE chain
--   (municipio → provincia → ccaa), writing a tuple that always satisfies both
--   composite FKs. The three levels are disjoint (guards on which id is the
--   deepest), so order between them is irrelevant and the file is idempotent
--   (converging UPDATEs).
--   Levels per table:
--     L0 country : pais          from country_id                          (no composite FK)
--     L1 locality: ciudad+province_id+provincia+region_id+region           (deepest)
--     L2 province: provincia+region_id+region   (province_id set, locality NULL)
--     L3 region  : region                       (region_id set, province NULL)
--   INNER JOIN → only rows whose ids match a reference are touched (orphans skipped,
--   never NULLed; name columns are NOT NULL DEFAULT '').

-- 1. Backfill.

-- entidad
UPDATE entidad e JOIN _ine_pais p ON p.country_id = e.country_id
  SET e.pais = p.nombre
  WHERE e.country_id IS NOT NULL

UPDATE entidad e
  JOIN _ine_municipio m ON m.locality_id = e.locality_id
  JOIN _ine_provincia r ON r.province_id = m.province_id
  JOIN _ine_ccaa      c ON c.region_id   = r.region_id
  SET e.ciudad = m.nombre, e.province_id = m.province_id,
      e.provincia = r.nombre, e.region_id = r.region_id, e.region = c.nombre
  WHERE e.locality_id IS NOT NULL

UPDATE entidad e
  JOIN _ine_provincia r ON r.province_id = e.province_id
  JOIN _ine_ccaa      c ON c.region_id   = r.region_id
  SET e.provincia = r.nombre, e.region_id = r.region_id, e.region = c.nombre
  WHERE e.province_id IS NOT NULL AND e.locality_id IS NULL

UPDATE entidad e JOIN _ine_ccaa c ON c.region_id = e.region_id
  SET e.region = c.nombre
  WHERE e.region_id IS NOT NULL AND e.province_id IS NULL

-- entidad_centro
UPDATE entidad_centro e JOIN _ine_pais p ON p.country_id = e.country_id
  SET e.pais = p.nombre
  WHERE e.country_id IS NOT NULL

UPDATE entidad_centro e
  JOIN _ine_municipio m ON m.locality_id = e.locality_id
  JOIN _ine_provincia r ON r.province_id = m.province_id
  JOIN _ine_ccaa      c ON c.region_id   = r.region_id
  SET e.ciudad = m.nombre, e.province_id = m.province_id,
      e.provincia = r.nombre, e.region_id = r.region_id, e.region = c.nombre
  WHERE e.locality_id IS NOT NULL

UPDATE entidad_centro e
  JOIN _ine_provincia r ON r.province_id = e.province_id
  JOIN _ine_ccaa      c ON c.region_id   = r.region_id
  SET e.provincia = r.nombre, e.region_id = r.region_id, e.region = c.nombre
  WHERE e.province_id IS NOT NULL AND e.locality_id IS NULL

UPDATE entidad_centro e JOIN _ine_ccaa c ON c.region_id = e.region_id
  SET e.region = c.nombre
  WHERE e.region_id IS NOT NULL AND e.province_id IS NULL

-- empleado
UPDATE empleado e JOIN _ine_pais p ON p.country_id = e.country_id
  SET e.pais = p.nombre
  WHERE e.country_id IS NOT NULL

UPDATE empleado e
  JOIN _ine_municipio m ON m.locality_id = e.locality_id
  JOIN _ine_provincia r ON r.province_id = m.province_id
  JOIN _ine_ccaa      c ON c.region_id   = r.region_id
  SET e.ciudad = m.nombre, e.province_id = m.province_id,
      e.provincia = r.nombre, e.region_id = r.region_id, e.region = c.nombre
  WHERE e.locality_id IS NOT NULL

UPDATE empleado e
  JOIN _ine_provincia r ON r.province_id = e.province_id
  JOIN _ine_ccaa      c ON c.region_id   = r.region_id
  SET e.provincia = r.nombre, e.region_id = r.region_id, e.region = c.nombre
  WHERE e.province_id IS NOT NULL AND e.locality_id IS NULL

UPDATE empleado e JOIN _ine_ccaa c ON c.region_id = e.region_id
  SET e.region = c.nombre
  WHERE e.region_id IS NOT NULL AND e.province_id IS NULL

-- 2. Drop ONLY the 3 name-forcing FKs.
CALL zn_drop_fk_if_exists('entidad',        'fk_entity_pais')
baseline/00-baseline-schema.sql:
-- BASELINE_MARKER: 2026-06-28_000
-- Genesis baseline: literal mysqldump --no-data of production (172.16.220.40) at 2026-06-28.
-- 350 base tables + 1 view (v_entidad_centro_ler_labels). Encoding: UTF-8 (utf8mb4).
-- Folds all migrations through 2026-06-27_001 (uq_modnotif, waste_submission_target,
-- dropped address name-FKs) — all verified present/absent in prod at dump time.
-- See docs/migrations/archive/ for the pre-reset history. Mirror: e2e/mysql/init.d/02-baseline-schema.sql

/*!40101 SET @OLD_CHARACTER_SET_CLIENT=@@CHARACTER_SET_CLIENT */

CREATE TABLE `_actions` (
  `action` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`action`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC

CREATE TABLE `_albaran_ler_incidencia` (
  `effect_type_id` varchar(2) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `descripcion` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`effect_type_id`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC

CREATE TABLE `_albaran_tipo` (
  `tipo` int NOT NULL,
  `descripcion` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `short` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`tipo`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC

CREATE TABLE `_albaran_tipo_contenedor` (
  `container_type_id` varchar(2) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `descripcion` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`container_type_id`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC

CREATE TABLE `_api_credential` (
  `credential_id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `partner_id` int NOT NULL,
  `account_id` int NOT NULL,
  `label` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `key_hash` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `key_prefix` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `expires_at` datetime(3) DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_used_at` datetime(3) DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_used_ip` varchar(45) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
  `updated_at` datetime(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
  PRIMARY KEY (`credential_id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `idx_api_credential_key_hash` (`key_hash`),
  KEY `fk_api_credential_account` (`account_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_api_credential_account` FOREIGN KEY (`account_id`) REFERENCES `_developer_account` (`account_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE `_autorizaciones` (
  `auth_id` varchar(10) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `nombre` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `descripcion` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `no_peligrosos` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `peligrosos` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `origen` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `destino` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `operador` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `transportista` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`auth_id`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC

CREATE TABLE `_categoria_profesional` (
  `job_category_id` int NOT NULL,
  `descripcion` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`job_category_id`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC

CREATE TABLE `_causa_rectificativa` (
  `reason_code` varchar(2) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `descripcion` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`reason_code`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC

CREATE TABLE `_chatbot_conversation` (
  `conversation_id` varchar(36) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `user_name` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(500) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp(6) NOT NULL,
  `last_accessed_at` timestamp(6) NOT NULL,
  `message_count` int DEFAULT '0',
  `deleted_at` datetime(6) DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`conversation_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_chatconv_user` (`company_id`,`user_name`) USING BTREE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_chatconv_usuario` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `user_name`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE `_chatbot_interaction_log` (
  `log_id` bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `conversation_id` varchar(36) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `question` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `answer` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `source` varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `queries_json` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `rounds` int DEFAULT '0',
  `duration_ms` bigint DEFAULT '0',
  `error` varchar(1000) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp(6) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6),
  `feedback_rating` tinyint DEFAULT NULL,
  `feedback_comment` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `model` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`log_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_chatlog_conversation` (`conversation_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_chatlog_created` (`created_at`) USING BTREE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_chatlog_conversation` FOREIGN KEY (`conversation_id`) REFERENCES `_chatbot_conversation` (`conversation_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=326 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE `_chatbot_manual_section` (
  `section_id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,

  `revoked_by` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `revoked_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

CREATE TABLE `_report_aggregation` (
  `aggregation_id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `report_id` int NOT NULL,
  `agg_key` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Identifier (e.g. sumNeto)',
  `label` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Display label (e.g. Total Neto)',
  `agg_function` enum('SUM','COUNT','AVG','MIN','MAX') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `field_path` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Field path to aggregate (e.g. lineas.neto)',
  `count_distinct` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `format` enum('DECIMAL','INTEGER','CURRENCY') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DECIMAL',
  `display_order` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`aggregation_id`),
  KEY `fk_report_aggregation_report` (`report_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_report_aggregation_report` FOREIGN KEY (`report_id`) REFERENCES `_report` (`report_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=7 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE `_report_column` (
  `column_id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `report_id` int NOT NULL,
  `column_key` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Identifier (e.g. fecha, neto)',
  `label` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Display label',
  `field_path` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'QueryBuilder field path (e.g. lineas.neto, fecha)',
  `format` enum('TEXT','DATE','DECIMAL','INTEGER','CURRENCY') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'TEXT',
  `display_order` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `default_visible` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  PRIMARY KEY (`column_id`),
  KEY `fk_report_column_report` (`report_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_report_column_report` FOREIGN KEY (`report_id`) REFERENCES `_report` (`report_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=13 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE `_report_group_by` (
  `group_by_id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `report_id` int NOT NULL,
  `parent_group_id` int DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Future: nested grouping (NULL = top-level)',
  `group_key` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Identifier (e.g. by-product, by-date)',
  `label` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Display label for the user',
  `group_fields` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Comma-separated field paths for GROUP BY',
  `group_label_tpl` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT 'Template for group header (e.g. {producto.codigo} - {producto.nombre})',
  `sort_field` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Field path for ordering groups',
  `sort_dir` varchar(4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ASC',
  `display_order` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`group_by_id`),
  KEY `fk_report_group_by_report` (`report_id`),
  KEY `fk_report_group_by_parent` (`parent_group_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_report_group_by_parent` FOREIGN KEY (`parent_group_id`) REFERENCES `_report_group_by` (`group_by_id`) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_report_group_by_report` FOREIGN KEY (`report_id`) REFERENCES `_report` (`report_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=3 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE `albaran` (
  `company_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `albaran_id` int NOT NULL,
  `tipo` int NOT NULL,
  `tpv` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `granel` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `fecha` date NOT NULL,
  `ejercicio_serie_numero` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci GENERATED ALWAYS AS (concat(`ejercicio`,_utf8mb4' ',`serie`,_utf8mb4' ',lpad(`numero`,5,_utf8mb4'0'))) STORED,
  `ejercicio` smallint NOT NULL,
  `serie` varchar(10) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `numero` int NOT NULL,
  `salida` tinyint(1) DEFAULT NULL,
  `trimestre` int NOT NULL,
  `mes` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `semana` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `matricula` varchar(40) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `remolque` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `comprobado` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `neto` decimal(11,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `total_neto` decimal(11,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `holder_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `holder_center_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `ct_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `operator_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `operator_center_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `operador_observaciones` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT '',
  `broker_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `broker_center_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `negociante_observaciones` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT '',
  `origin_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `origin_center_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `origen_observaciones` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT '',
  `dest_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `dest_center_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `destino_observaciones` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT '',
  `transport_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `transport_center_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `invoice_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `preinvoice_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `albaran_cliente` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `autogenerar_di` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `vinculable` tinyint(1) GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((case when ((`invoice_id` is null) and (`preinvoice_id` is null) and (`sealed` = 0)) then 1 else 0 end)) VIRTUAL NOT NULL,
  `transport_type_id` int(2) unsigned zerofill NOT NULL DEFAULT '03',
  `base_imponible` decimal(11,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `descuentos` decimal(11,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `irpf_percent` decimal(11,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.0000',
  `irpf` decimal(11,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `total_iva` decimal(11,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `importe` decimal(11,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `redondeo` decimal(11,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `impresiones` int unsigned NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `changed` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'modificado',
  `dark` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT 'h',
  `sealed` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `sealed_locked_by` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `sealed_locked_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `flagged` smallint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `transport_start` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `transport_end` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `peligrosos` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `numero_dcs` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT '',
  `numero_dcs_anulado` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT '',
  `metadata` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `signature` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `signature_ts` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `signature_sha` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_by` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `order_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `horas_servicio` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `km_servicio` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `tipo_servicio` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `admision_timestamp` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `salida_timestamp` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `valoracion_descripcion` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `co2_emissions` decimal(10,4) DEFAULT NULL,
  `container_action` varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `obra_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `empresa_contenedor_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `empresa_contenedor_destino_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`company_id`,`albaran_id`) USING BTREE,
  UNIQUE KEY `idx_albaran_numero_unique` (`company_id`,`ejercicio`,`serie`,`numero`) USING BTREE,
  UNIQUE KEY `idx_albaran_contrato` (`company_id`,`albaran_id`,`ct_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_albaran_serie` (`company_id`,`serie`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_albaran_ejercicio` (`company_id`,`tipo`,`ejercicio`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_albaran_operator_center` (`company_id`,`operator_id`,`operator_center_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_albaran_origin_center` (`company_id`,`origin_id`,`origin_center_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_albaran_dest_center` (`company_id`,`dest_id`,`dest_center_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_albaran_transport_center` (`company_id`,`transport_id`,`transport_center_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_albaran_factura` (`company_id`,`invoice_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_albaran_created_by` (`company_id`,`created_by`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_albaran_updated_by` (`company_id`,`updated_by`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_albaran_prefactura` (`company_id`,`preinvoice_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_albaran_tipo_ejercicio_origin_dest` (`company_id`,`tipo`,`ejercicio`,`origin_id`,`origin_center_id`,`dest_id`,`dest_center_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_albaran_contrato_data` (`company_id`,`ct_id`,`operator_id`,`operator_center_id`,`origin_id`,`origin_center_id`,`dest_id`,`dest_center_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_albaran_tipo` (`tipo`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_albaran_holder_center` (`company_id`,`holder_id`,`holder_center_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_albaran_transport_means` (`transport_type_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_albaran_tpv_2` (`company_id`,`tpv`,`operator_id`,`origin_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_albaran_order` (`company_id`,`tpv`,`fecha` DESC,`serie`,`numero` DESC,`albaran_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_albaran_company_tpv_fecha` (`company_id`,`tpv`,`fecha`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `fk_albaran__broker_center` (`company_id`,`broker_id`,`broker_center_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_albaran_ejercicio_serie_numero` (`company_id`,`ejercicio_serie_numero`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_albaran_fecha_origin_tipo` (`company_id`,`fecha`,`origin_id`,`tipo`),
  KEY `idx_albaran_reports` (`company_id`,`fecha`,`tipo`,`origin_id`),
  KEY `idx_albaran_ejercicio_reports` (`company_id`,`ejercicio`,`tipo`,`origin_id`),
  KEY `idx_albaran_work_order` (`company_id`,`order_id`),
  KEY `idx_albaran_ordering` (`company_id`,`tpv`,`fecha` DESC,`serie`,`numero` DESC,`albaran_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `fk_albaran_obra` (`company_id`,`obra_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `fk_albaran_empresa_contenedor` (`company_id`,`empresa_contenedor_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `fk_albaran_empresa_contenedor_destino` (`company_id`,`empresa_contenedor_destino_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `fk_albaran_sealed_locked_by` (`company_id`,`sealed_locked_by`),
  KEY `idx_albaran_sealed_lock` (`company_id`,`sealed_locked_at`),
  KEY `idx_albaran_vinculable_filter` (`company_id`,`vinculable`,`fecha` DESC),
  FULLTEXT KEY `ft_albaran_albaran_cliente` (`albaran_cliente`) /*!50100 WITH PARSER `ngram` */ ,
  FULLTEXT KEY `ft_albaran_matricula` (`matricula`) /*!50100 WITH PARSER `ngram` */ ,
  FULLTEXT KEY `ft_albaran_trailer` (`remolque`) /*!50100 WITH PARSER `ngram` */ ,
  FULLTEXT KEY `ft_albaran_ejercicio_serie_numero` (`ejercicio_serie_numero`) /*!50100 WITH PARSER `ngram` */ ,
  FULLTEXT KEY `ft_albaran_cliente` (`albaran_cliente`) /*!50100 WITH PARSER `ngram` */ ,
  FULLTEXT KEY `ft_matricula` (`matricula`) /*!50100 WITH PARSER `ngram` */ ,
  FULLTEXT KEY `ft_remolque` (`remolque`) /*!50100 WITH PARSER `ngram` */ ,
  FULLTEXT KEY `ft_esn` (`ejercicio_serie_numero`) /*!50100 WITH PARSER `ngram` */ ,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_albaran_broker` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `broker_id`) REFERENCES `entidad` (`company_id`, `client_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_albaran_broker_center` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `broker_id`, `broker_center_id`) REFERENCES `entidad_centro` (`company_id`, `client_id`, `center_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_albaran_created_by` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `created_by`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,

CREATE TABLE `automatizacion` (
  `company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `automatizacion_id` int NOT NULL,
  `entity_type` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(120) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `enabled` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `priority` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',

  `updated_by` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `audit_mode` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `trigger_type` enum('on_save','scheduled') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'on_save',
  `cron_expression` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_evaluated_at` datetime(3) DEFAULT NULL,

  KEY `ix_automatizacion_lookup` (`company_id`,`entity_type`,`enabled`,`priority`),
  KEY `fk_automatizacion_created_by` (`company_id`,`created_by`),
  KEY `fk_automatizacion_updated_by` (`company_id`,`updated_by`),
  KEY `idx_scheduled_rules` (`company_id`,`trigger_type`,`enabled`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_automatizacion_company` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`) REFERENCES `empresa` (`company_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_automatizacion_created_by` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `created_by`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_automatizacion_updated_by` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `updated_by`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE

CREATE TABLE `automatizacion_action_log` (
  `company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `id` int NOT NULL,
  `automatizacion_id` int NOT NULL,

  KEY `idx_per_rule` (`company_id`,`automatizacion_id`,`queued_at` DESC),

CREATE TABLE `cuenta_linea` (

  KEY `idx_cl_adjustment` (`company_id`,`adjustment_id`),

  CONSTRAINT `fk_cuenta_linea_cuenta_ajuste` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `adjustment_id`) REFERENCES `cuenta_ajuste` (`company_id`, `adjustment_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_cuenta_linea_empresa` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`) REFERENCES `empresa` (`company_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_cuenta_linea_entidad` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `client_id`) REFERENCES `entidad` (`company_id`, `client_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_cuenta_linea_factura_pago` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `invoice_id`, `payment_id`) REFERENCES `factura_pago` (`company_id`, `invoice_id`, `payment_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_cuenta_linea_gasto_pago` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `outlay_id`, `payment_id`) REFERENCES `gasto_pago` (`company_id`, `outlay_id`, `payment_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,

  CONSTRAINT `fk_cuenta_linea_master` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `master_id`) REFERENCES `cuenta_master` (`company_id`, `master_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_cuenta_linea_matches` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `match_id`) REFERENCES `cuenta_linea` (`company_id`, `line_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_cuenta_linea_nomina` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `employee_id`, `payroll_id`, `payment_id`) REFERENCES `empleado_nomina_pago` (`company_id`, `employee_id`, `payroll_id`, `payment_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,

CREATE TABLE `empleado` (

  `pais` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',

  `tag_id` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `tag_pin` int DEFAULT NULL,

  `access_token` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `picture_etag` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `picture_size` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `picture_content_type` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `fecha_alta` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `fecha_baja` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `permisos` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_by` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `schedule_id` int DEFAULT NULL,

  `portal_avisos` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  PRIMARY KEY (`company_id`,`employee_id`) USING BTREE,
  UNIQUE KEY `idx_empleado_access_token_unique` (`access_token`) USING BTREE,
  UNIQUE KEY `idx_empleado_usuario` (`company_id`,`user_name`) USING BTREE,
  UNIQUE KEY `idx_empleado_tag_id_unique` (`company_id`,`tag_id`) USING BTREE,

  KEY `idx_empleado_created_by` (`company_id`,`created_by`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_empleado_updated_by` (`company_id`,`updated_by`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_empleado_locality` (`locality_id`,`province_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_empleado_country` (`country_id`,`pais`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_empleado_province` (`province_id`,`region_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_empleado_region` (`region_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_empleado_grupo_cotizacion` (`job_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_empleado_job` (`company_id`,`job_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_empleado_centro_trabajo` (`company_id`,`own_entity_id`,`work_center_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_empleado_nacionalidad` (`nationality`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `fk_empleado_external_client_id` (`company_id`,`external_entity_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_empleado_dni_id` (`company_id`,`dni`,`id_anteriores`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `fk_empleado_horario` (`company_id`,`schedule_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_empleado_created_by` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `created_by`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_empleado_empresa` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`) REFERENCES `empresa` (`company_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_empleado_external_client_id` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `external_entity_id`) REFERENCES `entidad` (`company_id`, `client_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_empleado_horario` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `schedule_id`) REFERENCES `horario_laboral` (`company_id`, `schedule_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_empleado_munic` FOREIGN KEY (`locality_id`, `province_id`) REFERENCES `_ine_municipio` (`locality_id`, `province_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_empleado_nacionalidad` FOREIGN KEY (`nationality`) REFERENCES `_ine_pais` (`country_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_empleado_prov` FOREIGN KEY (`province_id`, `region_id`) REFERENCES `_ine_provincia` (`province_id`, `region_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_empleado_puesto` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `job_id`) REFERENCES `puesto_trabajo` (`company_id`, `job_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_empleado_region` FOREIGN KEY (`region_id`) REFERENCES `_ine_ccaa` (`region_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_empleado_updated_by` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `updated_by`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_empleado_usuario` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `user_name`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_empleado_work_center` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `own_entity_id`, `work_center_id`) REFERENCES `entidad_centro` (`company_id`, `client_id`, `center_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE

CREATE TABLE `empresa` (
  `company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `entity_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `center_for_public_prices` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `nombre` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `cif` varchar(30) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `direccion` varchar(55) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `ciudad` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `provincia` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL COMMENT '	',
  `region_id` int(2) unsigned zerofill NOT NULL,
  `cp` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `web` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT '',
  `email` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `logo` longblob,
  `logo_web` longblob,
  `iso_logo` longblob,
  `stamp` longblob,
  `stamp_size` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `hr_stamp` longblob,
  `hr_stamp_size` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `style` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default',
  `theme` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'black',
  `blocked` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `master_key` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `dominio` json NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `plan_name` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Basic',
  `sii` mediumtext CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `lopd_facturas` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `registro_mercantil` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `continuous_invoicing` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `invoicing_format` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `last_access_day` date DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'TO BE DELETED',
  `last_access_time` time DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'TO BE DELETED',
  `last_access_timestamp` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `unidad_peso` enum('kg','t') CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'kg' COMMENT 'Unidad base de peso usada por la empresa (kg o toneladas)',
  `tax_system` enum('IVA','IGIC') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'IVA',
  `ai_context` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `schedule_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `timezone` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Europe/Madrid',
  `waste_submission_target` varchar(16) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`company_id`) USING BTREE,
  UNIQUE KEY `idx_empresa_company_id_unique` (`company_id`) USING BTREE,
  UNIQUE KEY `idx_empresa_company_cif_unique` (`cif`) USING BTREE,
  UNIQUE KEY `idx_empresa_company_entity` (`company_id`,`entity_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_empresa_company_name` (`nombre`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_empresa_plan_name` (`plan_name`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_empresa_style` (`style`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_empresa_region` (`region_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `company_id` (`company_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `fk_empresa_horario` (`company_id`,`schedule_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_company_has_style` FOREIGN KEY (`style`) REFERENCES `_printable_style` (`style`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_company_regiob` FOREIGN KEY (`region_id`) REFERENCES `_ine_ccaa` (`region_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_empresa_horario` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `schedule_id`) REFERENCES `horario_laboral` (`company_id`, `schedule_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_empresa_plan` FOREIGN KEY (`plan_name`) REFERENCES `_plan` (`plan_name`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC

CREATE TABLE `empresa_config` (
  `module` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `setting` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,

CREATE TABLE `empresa_credencial` (
  `company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `credencial_id` int NOT NULL,
  `tipo` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `nombre` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `user_name` varchar(45) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `username` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `secrets_encrypted` longblob,
  `cn` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `expires_at` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `metadata_json` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `retired_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_used_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_by` varchar(45) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `updated_by` varchar(45) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  `active_slot_key` varchar(205) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci GENERATED ALWAYS AS ((case when ((`is_active` = true) and (`retired_at` is null)) then concat_ws(_utf8mb4'|',`tipo`,`nombre`,coalesce(`user_name`,_utf8mb4'')) end)) STORED,
  PRIMARY KEY (`company_id`,`credencial_id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uk_active_slot` (`company_id`,`active_slot_key`),
  KEY `idx_user` (`company_id`,`user_name`),
  KEY `idx_last_used` (`company_id`,`last_used_at`),
  KEY `fk_credencial_created_by` (`company_id`,`created_by`),
  KEY `fk_credencial_updated_by` (`company_id`,`updated_by`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_credencial_created_by` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `created_by`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_credencial_empresa` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`) REFERENCES `empresa` (`company_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_credencial_updated_by` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `updated_by`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `chk_credencial_tipo` CHECK ((`tipo` in (_utf8mb4'AEAT',_utf8mb4'ESIR',_utf8mb4'MAIL',_utf8mb4'WEBHOOK',_utf8mb4'GAIA'))),
  CONSTRAINT `chk_credencial_user_name` CHECK (((`user_name` is null) or (length(`user_name`) > 0)))
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE `empresa_credencial_audit` (
  `company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `audit_id` int NOT NULL,
  `credencial_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `tipo` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `nombre` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `action` enum('CREATE','UPDATE','DELETE','REVEAL','VALIDATE') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `user_name` varchar(45) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `user_ip` varchar(45) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `outcome` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `message` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`company_id`,`audit_id`),
  KEY `idx_credencial` (`company_id`,`credencial_id`,`created_at`),
  KEY `idx_action` (`company_id`,`action`,`created_at`),
  KEY `idx_user` (`company_id`,`user_name`,`created_at`),
  KEY `idx_audit_status` (`company_id`,`tipo`,`nombre`,`user_name`,`action`,`outcome`,`created_at`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_credencial_audit_empresa` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`) REFERENCES `empresa` (`company_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `chk_credencial_audit_outcome` CHECK ((`outcome` in (_utf8mb4'SUCCESS',_utf8mb4'FAILED',_utf8mb4'SKIPPED'))),
  CONSTRAINT `chk_credencial_audit_tipo` CHECK ((`tipo` in (_utf8mb4'AEAT',_utf8mb4'ESIR',_utf8mb4'MAIL',_utf8mb4'WEBHOOK',_utf8mb4'GAIA')))
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE `empresa_data` (
  `company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `binary_data` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `aeat_cert_encrypted` mediumblob,
  `aeat_cert_password_encrypted` mediumblob,
  `aeat_cert_alias` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `aeat_cert_migration_state` varchar(16) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'NONE',
  `aeat_cert_migrated_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `id` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci,
  `cn` varchar(1024) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `expires` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` datetime NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`company_id`) USING BTREE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_emp_data_empresa` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`) REFERENCES `empresa` (`company_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `empresa_data_aeat_state_invariant` CHECK ((((`aeat_cert_migration_state` = _utf8mb4'NONE') and (`binary_data` is null) and (`aeat_cert_encrypted` is null) and (`aeat_cert_password_encrypted` is null) and (`aeat_cert_alias` is null) and (`aeat_cert_migrated_at` is null)) or ((`aeat_cert_migration_state` = _utf8mb4'LEGACY_V1') and (`binary_data` is not null) and (`aeat_cert_encrypted` is null) and (`aeat_cert_password_encrypted` is null) and (`aeat_cert_alias` is null) and (`aeat_cert_migrated_at` is null)) or ((`aeat_cert_migration_state` = _utf8mb4'MIGRATED') and (`aeat_cert_encrypted` is not null) and (`aeat_cert_password_encrypted` is not null) and (`aeat_cert_alias` is not null) and (`aeat_cert_migrated_at` is not null))))
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC

  CONSTRAINT `fk_encuesta_modelo` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `survey_model_id`) REFERENCES `modelo_encuesta` (`company_id`, `survey_model_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,

CREATE TABLE `factura` (
  `company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `invoice_id` int NOT NULL,
  `regime_id` tinyint(2) unsigned zerofill NOT NULL DEFAULT '01',
  `invoice_type` varchar(2) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'F1',
  `fecha_limite` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `autofactura` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `amendment_type` varchar(2) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `amended_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `anulada` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `reason_code` varchar(2) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `causa_rectificacion` varchar(500) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `presentado_sii` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `estado_sii` varchar(1024) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `tally_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `timestamp_estado_cuadre` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `fecha` date NOT NULL,
  `periodo_liquidacion` varchar(7) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `ejercicio_serie_numero` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci GENERATED ALWAYS AS (concat(`ejercicio`,_utf8mb4' ',`serie`,_utf8mb4' ',lpad(`numero`,5,_utf8mb4'0'))) STORED,
  `ejercicio` smallint NOT NULL,
  `serie` varchar(11) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `numero` int NOT NULL,
  `trimestre` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `mes` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `semana` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `master_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `category_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `preinvoice_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `descripcion` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `referencia_pedido` varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `expediente_contratacion` varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `referencia_contrato` varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `client_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `base_imponible` decimal(11,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `descuentos` decimal(11,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `total_iva` decimal(11,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `irpf_percent` decimal(11,4) NOT NULL,
  `irpf` decimal(11,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `importe` decimal(11,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `impresiones` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `pago` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `pendiente` decimal(11,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `not_assigned` decimal(11,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `flagged` smallint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `has_albaran` tinyint NOT NULL,
  `has_orden` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `contabilizada` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_by` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `automatizacion_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `estado_face` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `presentado_face` datetime(3) DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`company_id`,`invoice_id`) USING BTREE,
  UNIQUE KEY `idx_factura_numero` (`company_id`,`ejercicio`,`serie`,`numero`) USING BTREE,
  UNIQUE KEY `fk_invoice_preinvoice` (`company_id`,`preinvoice_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_factura_entidad` (`company_id`,`client_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_factura_created_by` (`company_id`,`created_by`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_factura_updated_by` (`company_id`,`updated_by`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_factura_serie` (`company_id`,`serie`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_factura_categoria` (`company_id`,`master_id`,`category_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_factura_tipo` (`invoice_type`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_factura_regimen` (`regime_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_factura_rectificativa` (`company_id`,`amended_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_factura_rectificativa_tipo` (`amendment_type`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_factura_estado_cuadre` (`tally_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `fk_invoice_reason_code` (`reason_code`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_factura_ejercicio_serie_numero` (`company_id`,`ejercicio_serie_numero`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_factura_fecha` (`company_id`,`fecha`),
  KEY `idx_factura_automatizacion` (`company_id`,`automatizacion_id`),
  FULLTEXT KEY `ft_factura_descripcion` (`descripcion`) /*!50100 WITH PARSER `ngram` */ ,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_factura_amended` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `amended_id`) REFERENCES `factura` (`company_id`, `invoice_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_factura_amendment_type` FOREIGN KEY (`amendment_type`) REFERENCES `_tipo_factura_rectificativa` (`amendment_type`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_factura_automatizacion` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `automatizacion_id`) REFERENCES `automatizacion` (`company_id`, `automatizacion_id`) ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_factura_category` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `master_id`, `category_id`) REFERENCES `cuenta_categoria` (`company_id`, `master_id`, `category_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_factura_created_by` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `created_by`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_factura_empresa` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`) REFERENCES `empresa` (`company_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_factura_entidad` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `client_id`) REFERENCES `entidad` (`company_id`, `client_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_factura_master` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `master_id`) REFERENCES `cuenta_master` (`company_id`, `master_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_factura_preinvoice` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `preinvoice_id`) REFERENCES `prefactura` (`company_id`, `preinvoice_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_factura_reason_code` FOREIGN KEY (`reason_code`) REFERENCES `_causa_rectificativa` (`reason_code`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_factura_regime` FOREIGN KEY (`regime_id`) REFERENCES `_regimen_facturas` (`regime_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_factura_tally` FOREIGN KEY (`tally_id`) REFERENCES `_estado_cuadre` (`tally_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_factura_tipo` FOREIGN KEY (`invoice_type`) REFERENCES `_tipo_factura` (`invoice_type`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_factura_updated_by` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `updated_by`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC

CREATE TABLE `gasto` (
  `company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `outlay_id` int NOT NULL,
  `preinvoice_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `tpv` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `fecha` date NOT NULL,
  `fecha_factura` date NOT NULL,
  `ejercicio_factura` smallint GENERATED ALWAYS AS (year(`fecha_factura`)) STORED NOT NULL,
  `trimestre_factura` tinyint(1) GENERATED ALWAYS AS (quarter(`fecha_factura`)) STORED NOT NULL,
  `periodo_liquidacion` varchar(7) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `invoice_type` varchar(2) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'F1',
  `regime_id` tinyint(2) unsigned zerofill DEFAULT NULL,
  `operation_id` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `amendment_type` varchar(2) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `amended_outlay` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `fecha_limite` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `presentado_sii` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `estado_sii` varchar(1024) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `error_sii` varchar(1024) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `tally_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `timestamp_estado_cuadre` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `pendiente_factura` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `ejercicio` smallint NOT NULL,
  `trimestre` tinyint(1) NOT NULL,
  `client_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `master_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `category_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `insurance_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `factura` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `presupuesto` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `descripcion` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `redondeo` decimal(11,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `base_imponible` decimal(11,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `suplidos` decimal(11,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `total_iva` decimal(11,2) NOT NULL,
  `cuota_soportada` decimal(11,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `irpf` decimal(11,2) NOT NULL,
  `irpf_percent` decimal(11,3) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.000',
  `importe` decimal(11,2) NOT NULL,
  `cuota_deducible` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `pago` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `pendiente` decimal(11,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `not_assigned` decimal(11,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `has_albaran` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `flagged` smallint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_by` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `obra_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`company_id`,`outlay_id`) USING BTREE,
  UNIQUE KEY `idx_gasto_prefactura` (`company_id`,`preinvoice_id`) USING BTREE,
  UNIQUE KEY `idx_gasto_rectificado` (`company_id`,`amended_outlay`,`client_id`) USING BTREE,
  UNIQUE KEY `idx_gasto_search_1` (`company_id`,`outlay_id`,`client_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_gasto_created_by` (`company_id`,`created_by`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_gasto_updated_by` (`company_id`,`updated_by`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_gasto_categoria` (`company_id`,`master_id`,`category_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_gasto_entidad` (`company_id`,`client_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_gasto_date` (`company_id`,`fecha`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_gasto_category` (`company_id`,`master_id`,`category_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_gasto_tipo_operacion` (`operation_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_gasto_regimen` (`regime_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_gasto_tipo_factura` (`invoice_type`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_gasto_estado_cuadre` (`tally_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `fk_gasto_seguro` (`company_id`,`insurance_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_gasto_pago` (`company_id`,`pago`),
  KEY `fk_gasto_amendment_type` (`amendment_type`),
  KEY `fk_gasto_obra` (`company_id`,`obra_id`) USING BTREE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_gasto_amendment_type` FOREIGN KEY (`amendment_type`) REFERENCES `_tipo_factura_rectificativa` (`amendment_type`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_gasto_category` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `master_id`, `category_id`) REFERENCES `cuenta_categoria` (`company_id`, `master_id`, `category_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_gasto_created_by` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `created_by`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_gasto_empresa` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`) REFERENCES `empresa` (`company_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_gasto_entidad` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `client_id`) REFERENCES `entidad` (`company_id`, `client_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_gasto_master` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `master_id`) REFERENCES `cuenta_master` (`company_id`, `master_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_gasto_obra` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `obra_id`) REFERENCES `obra` (`company_id`, `obra_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE RESTRICT,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_gasto_operacion` FOREIGN KEY (`operation_id`) REFERENCES `_tipo_operacion` (`operation_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_gasto_prefactura` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `preinvoice_id`) REFERENCES `prefactura` (`company_id`, `preinvoice_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_gasto_rectificado` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `amended_outlay`, `client_id`) REFERENCES `gasto` (`company_id`, `outlay_id`, `client_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_gasto_regime` FOREIGN KEY (`regime_id`) REFERENCES `_regimen_gastos` (`regime_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_gasto_seguro` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `insurance_id`) REFERENCES `seguro` (`company_id`, `insurance_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_gasto_tally` FOREIGN KEY (`tally_id`) REFERENCES `_estado_cuadre` (`tally_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_gasto_tipo_factura` FOREIGN KEY (`invoice_type`) REFERENCES `_tipo_factura` (`invoice_type`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_gasto_updated_by` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `updated_by`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC

CREATE TABLE `horario_laboral` (

CREATE TABLE `horario_laboral_turno` (
  `company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `schedule_id` int NOT NULL,
  `shift_id` int NOT NULL,
  `day_of_week` tinyint NOT NULL COMMENT '1=MON .. 7=SUN (Java DayOfWeek.getValue())',
  `start_time` time NOT NULL,
  `end_time` time NOT NULL,
  `rotation_week` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0' COMMENT '0=every week, 1=week1, 2=week2, etc.',
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_by` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`company_id`,`schedule_id`,`shift_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `fk_turno_updated_by` (`company_id`,`updated_by`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `fk_turno_created_by` (`company_id`,`created_by`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_turno_schedule_day` (`company_id`,`schedule_id`,`day_of_week`) USING BTREE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_turno_created_by` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `created_by`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_turno_horario` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `schedule_id`) REFERENCES `horario_laboral` (`company_id`, `schedule_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE RESTRICT,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_turno_updated_by` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `updated_by`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `chk_turno_day_of_week` CHECK ((`day_of_week` between 1 and 7))
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC

  `config` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `filters` text CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `company_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `metadata` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
  `list` tinyint DEFAULT NULL,
  `views` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `acls` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_queries_company_id` (`company_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_queries_section` (`section`,`name`,`company_id`) USING BTREE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_company_has_query` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`) REFERENCES `empresa` (`company_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_query_module` FOREIGN KEY (`section`) REFERENCES `acl_modulo` (`module`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC

CREATE TABLE `recurso` (
  `company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `resource_id` int NOT NULL,
  `cifrado` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `filename` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `description` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `requires_signature` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `path` varchar(500) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `size` bigint NOT NULL,
  `content_type` varchar(30) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `etag` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `fecha` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `caducidad` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `original_path` varchar(500) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `original_size` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `original_etag` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `lock_password` varchar(200) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `thumb_path` varchar(500) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `thumb_size` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `thumb_content_type` varchar(30) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `thumb_etag` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `metadata` json NOT NULL,
  `albaran_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `client_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `outlay_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `invoice_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `preinvoice_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `product_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `employee_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `payroll_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `training_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `physical_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `leave_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `mail_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `ct_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `vehicle_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `service_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `insurance_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `estimate_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `location_incident_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `removal_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `ticket_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `signed_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_by` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `order_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `nt_id` int DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'FK to notificacion_previa.nt_id; NULL for resources not attached to an NT',
  PRIMARY KEY (`company_id`,`resource_id`) USING BTREE,
  UNIQUE KEY `idx_resource_payroll_resource` (`company_id`,`resource_id`,`employee_id`,`payroll_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_recurso_created_by` (`company_id`,`created_by`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_recurso_updated_by` (`company_id`,`updated_by`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_recurso_albaran_id` (`company_id`,`albaran_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_recurso_invoice_id` (`company_id`,`invoice_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_recurso_preinvoice_id` (`company_id`,`preinvoice_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_recurso_outlay_id` (`company_id`,`outlay_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_recurso_product_id` (`company_id`,`product_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_recurso_client_id` (`company_id`,`client_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_recurso_employee_id` (`company_id`,`employee_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_recurso_mail_id` (`company_id`,`mail_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_recurso_description` (`company_id`,`description`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_recurso_filename` (`company_id`,`filename`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_recurso_company_id` (`company_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_recurso__contrato` (`company_id`,`ct_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_recurso__formacion_empleado` (`company_id`,`training_id`,`employee_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_recurso__empleado_reconocimiento` (`company_id`,`employee_id`,`physical_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_recurso__empleado_nomina` (`company_id`,`employee_id`,`payroll_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_recurso__vehiculo` (`company_id`,`vehicle_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `recurso__seguro` (`company_id`,`insurance_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `recurso__presupuesto` (`company_id`,`estimate_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `recurso__empleado_accidente` (`company_id`,`employee_id`,`leave_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `recurso__ubicacion_incidencia` (`company_id`,`location_incident_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `recurso__vehiculo_servicio` (`company_id`,`vehicle_id`,`service_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `recurso__mwm_retirada` (`company_id`,`removal_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `recurso__ticket` (`company_id`,`ticket_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_recurso_order_id` (`company_id`,`order_id`),
  KEY `idx_recurso_nt_id` (`company_id`,`nt_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_recurso_accidente` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `employee_id`, `leave_id`) REFERENCES `empleado_accidente` (`company_id`, `employee_id`, `leave_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_recurso_created_by` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `created_by`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_recurso_empleado` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `employee_id`) REFERENCES `empleado` (`company_id`, `employee_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_recurso_empresa` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`) REFERENCES `empresa` (`company_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_recurso_entidad` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `client_id`) REFERENCES `entidad` (`company_id`, `client_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_recurso_factura` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `invoice_id`) REFERENCES `factura` (`company_id`, `invoice_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_recurso_formacion` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `training_id`, `employee_id`) REFERENCES `formacion_empleado` (`company_id`, `training_id`, `employee_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_recurso_gasto` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `outlay_id`) REFERENCES `gasto` (`company_id`, `outlay_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_recurso_nomina` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `employee_id`, `payroll_id`) REFERENCES `empleado_nomina` (`company_id`, `employee_id`, `payroll_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_recurso_orden_trabajo` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `order_id`) REFERENCES `orden_trabajo` (`company_id`, `order_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_recurso_presupuesto` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `estimate_id`) REFERENCES `presupuesto` (`company_id`, `estimate_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_recurso_producto` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `product_id`) REFERENCES `producto` (`company_id`, `product_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_recurso_reconocimiento` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `employee_id`, `physical_id`) REFERENCES `empleado_reconocimiento` (`company_id`, `employee_id`, `physical_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_recurso_retirada` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `removal_id`) REFERENCES `mwm_retirada` (`company_id`, `removal_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_recurso_updated_by` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `updated_by`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_recurso_vehiculo` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `vehicle_id`) REFERENCES `vehiculo` (`company_id`, `vehicle_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recurso__albaran` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `albaran_id`) REFERENCES `albaran` (`company_id`, `albaran_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recurso__contrato` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `ct_id`) REFERENCES `contrato_tratamiento` (`company_id`, `ct_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recurso__mail` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `mail_id`) REFERENCES `correo_enviado` (`company_id`, `mail_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recurso__prefactura` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `preinvoice_id`) REFERENCES `prefactura` (`company_id`, `preinvoice_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recurso__seguro` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `insurance_id`) REFERENCES `seguro` (`company_id`, `insurance_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recurso__ticket` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `ticket_id`) REFERENCES `ticket` (`company_id`, `ticket_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recurso__ubicacion_incidencia` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `location_incident_id`) REFERENCES `ubicacion_incidencia` (`company_id`, `location_incident_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recurso__vehiculo_servicio` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `vehicle_id`, `service_id`) REFERENCES `vehiculo_servicio` (`company_id`, `vehicle_id`, `service_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC

CREATE TABLE `recurso_etiqueta` (

CREATE TABLE `recurso_firma` (

CREATE TABLE `scheduler_execution_log` (
  `id` bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `run_id` varchar(36) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `task_id` varchar(64) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `company_name` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `execution_date` date NOT NULL,
  `started_at` timestamp(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
  `completed_at` timestamp(3) NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `duration_ms` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `success` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `description` varchar(500) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `error_description` varchar(2000) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `attempt` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `emails_sent` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `node_id` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_sel_run_id` (`run_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_sel_execution_date` (`execution_date`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_sel_task_id` (`task_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_sel_company_id` (`company_id`) USING BTREE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=25858 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE `scheduler_run` (
  `id` bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `run_id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `status` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'RUNNING',
  `trigger_source` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'SCHEDULED',
  `started_at` datetime(3) NOT NULL,
  `completed_at` datetime(3) DEFAULT NULL,
  `duration_ms` bigint DEFAULT NULL,
  `total_tasks` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `success_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `failure_count` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `task_ids` varchar(2000) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `error_message` varchar(2000) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uk_run_id` (`run_id`),
  KEY `idx_started_at` (`started_at`),
  KEY `idx_status` (`status`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=68 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE `seguro` (

  KEY `fk_seguro_user_update` (`company_id`,`updated_by`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `company_id` (`company_id`,`insurance_id`,`intermediary_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `fk_seguro_category` (`company_id`,`master_id`,`category_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `fk_seguro_recurrencia` (`recurrence_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `fk_seguro_entidad` (`company_id`,`insurance_client_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_seguro_category` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `master_id`, `category_id`) REFERENCES `cuenta_categoria` (`company_id`, `master_id`, `category_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_seguro_created_by` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `created_by`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_seguro_empresa` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`) REFERENCES `empresa` (`company_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_seguro_entidad` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `insurance_client_id`) REFERENCES `entidad` (`company_id`, `client_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_seguro_master` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `master_id`) REFERENCES `cuenta_master` (`company_id`, `master_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_seguro_mediador` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `intermediary_id`) REFERENCES `entidad` (`company_id`, `client_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_seguro_recurrence` FOREIGN KEY (`recurrence_id`) REFERENCES `_recurrencia` (`recurrence_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_seguro_tipo` FOREIGN KEY (`insurance_type_id`) REFERENCES `_tipo_seguro` (`insurance_type_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_seguro_updated_by` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `updated_by`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE

CREATE TABLE `seguro_pago` (

  CONSTRAINT `fk_seguro_pago_created` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `created_by`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,

CREATE TABLE `ticket` (
  `company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `ticket_id` int NOT NULL,
  `own_client_id` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',

  `remolque` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `comentarios` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `comentarios_2` varchar(50) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `client_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `client_center_id` int DEFAULT NULL,

  `unidad` varchar(10) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `salida` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `cierre` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
