/*!50001 CREATE VIEW `v_entidad_centro_ler_labels` AS SELECT 
 1 AS `company_id`,
 1 AS `client_id`,
 1 AS `center_id`,
 1 AS `codigo_ler`,
 1 AS `residue_id`,
 1 AS `auth_id`,
 1 AS `table_2`,
 1 AS `process`,
 1 AS `autorizado_almacen`,
 1 AS `autorizado_gestion`,
 1 AS `autorizado_produccion`,
 1 AS `codigo_proceso`,
 1 AS `descripcion_proceso`,
 1 AS `codigo_residuo`,
 1 AS `descripcion_residuo`,
 1 AS `default_client_id`,
 1 AS `default_center_id`,
 1 AS `self_disposal`,
 1 AS `compactor_enabled`,
 1 AS `residual`,
 1 AS `nombre_residuo`,
 1 AS `free_labels`,
 1 AS `printed_labels`*/

CREATE TABLE `vehiculo` (
  `company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `vehicle_id` int NOT NULL,
  `matricula` varchar(20) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `vehicle_type_id` int NOT NULL,
  `alquiler` tinyint NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `provider_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `year` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `marca` varchar(40) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `modelo` varchar(100) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `matriculacion` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `seguro_aseguradora` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `seguro_poliza` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `seguro_comentarios` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `seguro_precio` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0.00',
  `seguro_renovacion` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `proxima_itv` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `proxima_revision` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `tacografo` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `adquisicion` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `mma` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `tara` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `vin` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `picture_etag` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `picture_size` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `picture_content_type` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `baja` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `renting` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `coste` decimal(10,2) DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_by` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `co2_factor` decimal(10,4) DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_lat` decimal(11,7) DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_lng` decimal(11,7) DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_location_ts` datetime(6) DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_seen` datetime(6) DEFAULT NULL,
  `moving` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `ignition` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `last_ingested_device_ts` datetime(6) DEFAULT NULL,
  `device_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `last_heading` smallint DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Heading in degrees 0-359, latest reading from Phase 4',
  `last_speed` decimal(5,2) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Speed in km/h, latest reading from Phase 4',
  PRIMARY KEY (`company_id`,`vehicle_id`) USING BTREE,
  UNIQUE KEY `idx_vehicle_plate_unique` (`company_id`,`matricula`) USING BTREE,
  UNIQUE KEY `idx_vehiculo_device` (`company_id`,`device_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_vehicle_created_by` (`company_id`,`created_by`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_vehicle_updated_by` (`company_id`,`updated_by`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_vehicle_has_type` (`vehicle_type_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `company_id` (`company_id`,`matricula`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `fk_vechicle_provider` (`company_id`,`provider_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `idx_vehiculo_last_seen` (`company_id`,`last_seen`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_vechicle_provider` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `provider_id`) REFERENCES `entidad` (`company_id`, `client_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_vehiculo_created_by` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `created_by`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_vehiculo_device` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `device_id`) REFERENCES `tracking_device` (`company_id`, `tracking_device_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_vehiculo_empresa` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`) REFERENCES `empresa` (`company_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_vehiculo_tipo` FOREIGN KEY (`vehicle_type_id`) REFERENCES `_tipo_vehiculo` (`vehicle_type_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_vehiculo_updated_by` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `updated_by`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC

CREATE TABLE `vehiculo_servicio` (
  `company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `vehicle_id` int NOT NULL,
  `service_id` int NOT NULL,
  `fecha` date NOT NULL,
  `fecha_fin` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `service_type_id` int NOT NULL,
  `siguiente_revision` date DEFAULT NULL,
  `provider_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `observaciones` varchar(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `favorable` tinyint(1) NOT NULL,
  `importe` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_by` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_by` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`company_id`,`vehicle_id`,`service_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `fk_vehiculo_revision_entidad` (`company_id`,`provider_id`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `fk_vehiculo_revision_created_by` (`company_id`,`created_by`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `fk_vehiculo_revision_updated_by` (`company_id`,`updated_by`) USING BTREE,
  KEY `fk_vehiculo_revision_tipo_servicio` (`company_id`,`service_type_id`) USING BTREE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_veh_srv_created_by` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `created_by`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_veh_srv_entidad` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `provider_id`) REFERENCES `entidad` (`company_id`, `client_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_veh_srv_tipo` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `service_type_id`) REFERENCES `tipo_servicio_vehiculo` (`company_id`, `service_type_id`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_veh_srv_updated_by` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `updated_by`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`) ON DELETE RESTRICT ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_vehiculo_revision_vehiculo` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `vehicle_id`) REFERENCES `vehiculo` (`company_id`, `vehicle_id`) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci ROW_FORMAT=DYNAMIC

CREATE TABLE `visibility_restriction` (
  `company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `restriction_id` int NOT NULL,
  `entity_class` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `where_clause` varchar(1000) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `description` varchar(200) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT '1',
  `created_by` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_by` varchar(45) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`company_id`,`restriction_id`),
  KEY `fk_vis_restriction_created_by` (`company_id`,`created_by`),
  KEY `fk_vis_restriction_updated_by` (`company_id`,`updated_by`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_vis_restriction_created_by` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `created_by`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_vis_restriction_updated_by` FOREIGN KEY (`company_id`, `updated_by`) REFERENCES `empresa_usuario` (`company_id`, `user_name`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE `waste_submission` (
  `company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `submission_id` int NOT NULL,
  `platform` varchar(16) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `document_type` varchar(8) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `document_number` varchar(40) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `status` varchar(16) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `phase` varchar(2) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `csv` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `submitted_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `reserved_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `platform_result_code` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `attempts` int NOT NULL DEFAULT '0',
  `next_attempt_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `albaran_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `codigo_ler` varchar(20) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `residue_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `nt_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_by` varchar(45) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_by` varchar(45) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`company_id`,`submission_id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `uq_waste_submission_slot` (`company_id`,`platform`,`document_type`,`document_number`),
  KEY `idx_ws_albaran` (`company_id`,`albaran_id`,`codigo_ler`,`residue_id`),
  KEY `idx_ws_recovery` (`company_id`,`status`,`reserved_at`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE `waste_submission_event` (
  `company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `event_id` int NOT NULL,
  `submission_id` int NOT NULL,
  `phase` varchar(2) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `csv` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `platform_result_code` varchar(32) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `occurred_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_by` varchar(45) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`company_id`,`event_id`),
  KEY `idx_wse_submission` (`company_id`,`submission_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci

CREATE TABLE `waste_submission_result` (
  `company_id` int NOT NULL,
  `result_id` int NOT NULL,
  `event_id` int NOT NULL,
  `severity` varchar(8) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `code` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `description` varchar(1000) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_by` varchar(45) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`company_id`,`result_id`),
  KEY `idx_wsr_event` (`company_id`,`event_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
